# docker_org_team_member (Resource)

Manages team members associated with an organization.

-> **Note**: This resource requires credentials that can read and manage organization groups, such as an owner login with a user password or an organization access token (OAT) with the `Group Read` and `Group Edit` scopes.

## Example Usage

```hcl
resource "docker_org_team_member" "example" {
	org_name  = "my-organization"
	team_name = "dev-team"
	user_name = "johndoe"
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_name` (String) Organization name
- `team_name` (String) Team name
- `user_name` (String) User name to be added to the team

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the team member
